executives.name: Bethany Mayer
executives.background: Ms. Mayer has been a director since 2019. She was President and CEO of Ixia.

executives.name: Carrie Palin
executives.background: Carrie Palin has been a member of our Board since February 2021. She is currently the Senior Vice President and Chief Marketing Officer of Cisco Systems, Inc.

executives.name: Jack Lazar
executives.background: Former CFO of GoPro and Atheros Communications. He serves on several public company boards.
